brief_notes: Covers the same experimental scope as the skill version but tables are substantially less informative -- the performance table omits LSTM values ('Lower'), the hemisphere table says 'High' instead of giving actual PCC values, and the occlusion table uses qualitative descriptors ('Higher'/'Lower') instead of delta-PCC values. The methods and task description tables are good, but the quantitative weakness in the results section significantly undermines rigor.
